examples: It was so productive that there was a shortage of labour to harvest it, of bull carts to haul it to the threshing floor, of jute bags to store it.
We've got to finish the threshing while the good weather lasts.
Too bad! We'd just got the wheat to the threshing ground when it started to rain.
The grounds were likely a former rice paddy, but it was easier to imagine a cricket match there than women threshing rice.
Palmer appeared as part of the Arts in Schools program at the Atlanta-based Threshing Floor Academy of Arts and Sciences Inc.
